# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

# Install the linkerd control plane on your cluster
linkerd install | kubectl apply -f -

# Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation to automatically inject proxies for all services in a namespace
kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: my-namespace
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
EOF

# Configure server and authorization policies for services in a namespace
kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-authz
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: ServiceAccount
    namespace: my-namespace
    name: default
  rules:
    - to:
        - action: ALLOW
          resources:
            - group: "*"
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  enableServiceProfiles: true
EOF
